ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., running, paused, completed) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment configuration */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this configuration belongs to */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used in the experiment (e.g., learning rate, batch size) */,
  "model_architecture" TEXT /* Model architecture used in the experiment */,
  "environment_config" TEXT /* Environment configuration (e.g., observation space, action space) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the experiment configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_configs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this metric belongs to */,
  "episode_length_mean" REAL /* Mean episode length */,
  "episode_reward_mean" REAL /* Mean episode reward */,
  "time_elapsed" REAL /* Time elapsed during the experiment */,
  "n_updates" INTEGER /* Number of updates */,
  "ent_coef" REAL /* Entropy coefficient */,
  "ent_coef_loss" REAL /* Entropy coefficient loss */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate */,
  "actor_loss" REAL /* Actor loss */,
  "critic_loss" REAL /* Critic loss */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_metrics" (
  "time_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time metric */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this time metric belongs to */,
  "episodes" INTEGER /* Number of episodes */,
  "fps" INTEGER /* Frames per second */,
  "total_timesteps" INTEGER /* Total timesteps */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the time metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_user" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission level of the user for the experiment (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment related to the notification */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., experiment completion, performance degradation) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "read" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "paper" TEXT /* Reference to the paper that introduced the algorithm */,
  "code" TEXT /* Reference to the implementation code of the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environment" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the environment (e.g., Atari, Mujoco) */,
  "gym_version" TEXT /* Version of the Gym environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_algorithm" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment configuration */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id", "algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_environment" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment configuration */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id", "environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_config" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment configuration this hyperparameter belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hyperparameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES experiment_configs ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_architectures" (
  "model_architecture_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model architecture */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment configuration this model architecture belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the model architecture */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model architecture */,
  "diagram" TEXT /* Diagram of the model architecture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_architecture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_architectures_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES experiment_configs ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this reward belongs to */,
  "episode" INTEGER /* Episode number when the reward was obtained */,
  "reward" REAL /* Reward value */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reward was obtained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "losses" (
  "loss_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loss */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this loss belongs to */,
  "episode" INTEGER /* Episode number when the loss was obtained */,
  "loss" REAL /* Loss value */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the loss was obtained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loss_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_losses_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this note belongs to */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the note */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the note was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
